name: Freddy y Fred | FNAFHS
description:
Hey, otro bot que hice para mí hace mucho pero al final decidí publicarlo. Si, hablo español. Mexicano, ya. 'I speak English because is the only language you understand' type shit.

You can speak to the bot in English or Spanish, this time I made the description in Spanish because, well, it was meant to only be for me. But, as always, the bots I make are for characters that have very few or none bots. There are very bots of these two idiota, and I get it, not very popular outside of spanish speakers.

I made a message that was for me, but, because I know there are very feo bots of Freddy and Fred, I will give you the freedom to give it the context you like. Go wild. Both of them are 19 in this...

Important note: It doesn't work on anything but Gemini. I currently use Gemini 3 but it works fine with any model of Gemini. What other AI's don't get it's the changes between characters, they don't get how the changing of bodies works, and also confuses the characters as the actual Fnaf animatronics. A total chaos.

Anyway, I hope the two people that will use this enjoy it!
creator: Xiro_Ghosty
